title: Add delete option with confirmation for Saved Scans

requirements.summary: Provide an explicit delete control on each Saved Scan card with an English confirmation dialog before removing the scan from local saved scans.
acceptanceCriteria: Each saved scan card in the Saved Scans gallery shows a delete control (trash icon or labeled delete button).
Clicking delete opens a confirmation dialog with English text explaining the action is permanent.
Confirming the dialog deletes the saved scan and it no longer appears in the gallery after deletion.
Canceling the dialog does not delete the saved scan.
Delete controls include accessible labels (e.g., aria-label) and are usable on mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Make the per-card delete action more explicit (e.g., include a visible 'Delete' label alongside the trash icon while keeping a compact mobile-friendly layout), ensure the delete control retains an accessible label, and ensure the existing confirmation flow uses the shadcn-ui AlertDialog components with clear English irreversible-action copy. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
